description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 2. Continuous/background observation, but only next-turn publication**.

Goal: add draft/staged observation state distinct from the published OM state so long-turn work can accumulate without mutating what is injected into the prompt.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/types.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/state.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`

Worker notes:
- expect separate staged observations/task/response fields and possibly a staged cursor if that proves useful
- preserve compatibility with the current published-state flow
- this ticket is about state shape and invariants first, not about changing hook timing yet
title: Introduce staged draft observation state separate from published OM state
